name: Null Pointer Spectre
description: A ghost of a variable that points to nothing. Be quick before it disappears!

name: The Great Compiler
description: It judges every line of code you write. No syntax error goes unpunished.

name: Memory Leak Hydra
description: For every bit you free, two more leak. A true test of endurance.

name: Lord of the Kernel
description: The ultimate authority. It controls everything your code touches.
